francophone.title: EasyJet annonce un «accord de principe» pour un rachat par un fonds d’investissement américain

francophone.excerpt: Préférer l’antijeu au jeu, comme le Paraguay contre la France, c’est moche mais cela fait partie du jeu. Et c’est peu efficace.

francophone.excerpt: Qualifiés pour les quarts de finale, les Français ont vécu une rencontre très hachée face au Paraguay, samedi, avec un arbitrage qui fait polémique autour du monde.

anglophone.title: Folarin Balogun's soccer ban suspended by FIFA, allowing U.S. striker to play Belgium
anglophone.excerpt: U.S. soccer star Folarin Balogun has had his World Cup ban suspended by FIFA, making him free to play in the United States' round of 16 game against Belgium on Monday.

anglophone.title: Plane hit by firework while landing in Chicago
anglophone.excerpt: The plane had 52 passengers and six crew onboard. No injuries were reported.

anglophone.title: Iran's supreme leader absent as senior officials attend ayatollah's funeral

anglophone.excerpt: Nigeria's government said one of its nationals was reportedly killed by police officers "using gruesome interrogation techniques".

anglophone.title: Guam and surrounding Pacific islands brace for impact of Super Typhoon Bavi

anglophone.title: Construction is a man's game. These women are demolishing the barriers

anglophone.title: A new law in California will clarify 'sell by' dates to reduce food waste

anglophone.title: Pennsylvania's proposed data centers are bringing strangers together in protest
